title: Document scorecard 1039 evaluation
description:
Feature: Capture the requested feedback evaluation metrics
Scenario: Run the synchronous evaluation for scorecard 1039
  Given the evaluation parameters (scorecard=1039, score=45427, version=b77666bf-2d90-4522-8796-1d27fe8317f6, days=30)
  When the Plexus evaluation CLI completes in synchronous mode with logs saved
  Then I have a concise JSON summary containing evaluation_id, metrics, root cause data, and baseline metadata

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Plan: Run plexus evaluate feedback --scorecard=1039 --score=45427 --days=30 --version=b77666bf-2d90-4522-8796-1d27fe8317f6, redirect output to logs/feedback_eval_1039.log, capture evaluation metadata, attach baseline metadata, and deliver requested JSON summary.
